result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  dec    Decrypt string of value.
  enc    Encrypt string of value.
  gen    Generate key and IV to file.

commands.payload:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  dec    Decrypt string of value.
  enc    Encrypt string of value.
  gen    Generate key and IV to file.

result.stdout:
Usage: dec [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Decrypt string of value.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    Encrypted string value.

Options:
  -k, --key <string>           Encryption key. [Required]
  -v, --iv <string>            Initialization vector. [Required]
  -a, --algorithms <string>    Encryption algorithm. [Default: @"AES256"]
